steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject of the clause is singular: “the word 'lasso'”. The parenthetical “(a rope)” is descriptive and doesn't change the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Choice D “derives” provides the singular verb form required by subject-verb agreement. Choices A, B, and C don't provide this form. That matches choice D — D is correct.
